description_long: This cabin consists of three connected wooden structures, each with a steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The central section is slightly recessed and flanked by two larger volumes, one of which is elevated on stilts, suggesting a raised entry or lookout area. The exterior walls are rendered in a warm brown wood, with visible support beams and posts adding to the rustic appearance. Windows are small and rectangular, symmetrically placed on the front-facing facades, while doors are located beneath the overhangs and on the elevated section. The cabin sits on a dark, rectangular base that could represent a platform or stylized ground. The overall design evokes a traditional rustic or Scandinavian style, suitable for a natural or park-like urban setting.
description: A rustic, multi-section wooden cabin with steep gray gable roofs, small windows, and an elevated entryway on stilts, set on a dark platform. The structure features warm brown wood and symmetrical architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing three connected cabin sections, with the rightmost section elevated on stilts and all roofs pitched in gray.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabin, with two main rooflines visible and the elevated section's stilts prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the three sections and the elevated area, but with less detail on doors and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the single main roof and the supporting stilts beneath the elevated section.
attribute_roof_type: gable roofs with steep pitch, simple overhangs, and uniform gray material
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front facades of each section, evenly spaced
attribute_door_placement: one main door beneath the elevated section on the front, with possible secondary doors under overhangs
